chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-562 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of M.A No.2748/20. 3. For hearing of main case. 13.07.2020 Mr. Ayaz Ali Gopang, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of petitioners alongwith petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. Advocate General, Sindh a/w Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and I.O/ASI Muhammad Nawaz of P.S Naushahro Feroze. = Mr. Masood Rasool Babar, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.7, 9 and 10 whereas learned Additional A.G. in compliance of order dated 23.06.2020 files statement of I.O. alongwith marks certificate of petitioner No.1, showing her date of birth as 26.02.2001, which are taken on record. In compliance of order dated 23.06.2020, ASI Muhammad Nawaz of PS Naushahro Feroze, who is the Investigating Officer of Crime No.96 of 2020 registered at PS Naushahro Feroze u/s 452, 365-B PPC, is present and files the copy of statement of petitioner No.1 recorded by him today in Court u/s 161 Cr.P.C. which is taken on record. He states that as per statement of petitioner No.1, she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 on account of her freewill, without any pressure or coercion and she has not been abducted by anyone hence he shall submit such report for disposal of subject F.I.R under cancel class before the competent Court of law. He is directed to submit such report within three days hereof before concerned Judicial Magistrate for passing appropriate orders. Learned counsel for the petitioners on being satisfied with above statement of I.O, does not press this petition further which is accordingly disposed of along with listed application.

He is directed to submit such report within three days hereof before concerned Judicial Magistrate for passing appropriate orders. Learned counsel for the petitioners on being satisfied with above statement of I.O, does not press this petition further which is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. At this Juncture, learned counsel for the petitioners states that SHO P.S Naushahro Feroze may be directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with law and no arrest should be made in the aforesaid FIR. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
